item_summary: Breville Barista Express semi-automatic espresso machine with built-in conical burr grinder. Requires regular cleaning of the group head, periodic descaling, and water filter replacement to maintain shot quality and prevent scale damage.

tasks.title: Descale espresso machine
tasks.description: Run a full descaling cycle using citric-acid-based espresso descaler to remove mineral scale from the boiler and water lines. Frequency depends on water hardness; soft-water households can extend to every 3 months.
video_search_queries: how to descale espresso machine at home

tasks.title: Replace water filter
tasks.description: Swap the in-tank charcoal water filter to reduce scale buildup and improve taste. Manufacturer-recommended interval; replace sooner if you brew more than ~5 shots per day.

supplies.label: Breville-compatible water filter
supplies.search_query: Breville claro swiss water filter replacement

video_search_queries: Breville Barista Express water filter replacement

tasks.title: Backflush group head
tasks.description: Blind-disc backflush with espresso machine cleaning detergent to clear coffee oils and grounds from the three-way valve and group head.
